headline: Humana Faces Pay Oversight Push While Expanding Cardiac Care Programs
summary: Humana (NYSE:HUM) faces a shareholder proposal seeking tighter oversight of executive severance pay ahead of its upcoming annual meeting. The proposal calls for shareholder approval of large golden parachute packages, which the board has recommended voting against. Separately, Humana announced expanded value-based cardiac care partnerships for Medicare Advantage members across multiple states. The new cardiac care arrangements aim to improve heart health outcomes and reduce hospitalizations...
